title: Hearty Stew
description: A comforting and flavorful stew made with tender Irish stewing beef, earthy potatoes, and a hint of xenial spices.

ingredients.name: Xenial spices
ingredients.notes: a blend of thyme, rosemary, and bay leaves

instructions: Season the beef with salt and pepper.
Dredge the beef in flour, shaking off excess.
Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the beef until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the callaloo, potatoes, and xenial spices to the pot.
Pour in enough beef broth to cover the ingredients and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Braise the stew for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
